title: Intricately Crispy Norwegian Salmon Wrap
description: A low-calorie Norwegian dish featuring herbal flavors and crispy textures, perfect for midnight cravings. This dish is made with mustard seeds and a mirepoix base, wrapped in a corn husk wrap.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together mustard seeds, mirepoix mix, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Place the salmon fillet on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with olive oil.
Sprinkle the mustard seed mixture evenly over the salmon fillet.
Bake the salmon in the preheated oven for 12 minutes or until cooked through.
While the salmon is cooking, warm the corn husk wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Once the salmon is cooked, let it cool for a minute before slicing it into thin strips.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few slices of the salmon onto each corn husk wrap.
